title: Get Fable 5 output on a cheaper model
summary: A leaked Fable 5 system prompt can be injected into Claude Opus 4.8 to achieve near-identical output quality at a fraction of the cost. The approach requires only one line of code and is available on GitHub.
writeup: The video shows how a leaked Fable 5 system prompt can be injected into Claude Opus 4.8 to reach near-identical output quality at lower cost. The method needs only one line of code and is published on GitHub. The relevance is cost: matching a pricier model's results by transplanting its system prompt onto a cheaper one. Concepts touched include prompt engineering, reinforcement learning, and domain adaptation.
